hero.title: Remember More,
hero.subtitle: Retentio uses scientifically proven spaced repetition algorithms to help you efficiently memorize anything — vocabulary, concepts, and beyond.

about.title: About Retentio
about.description: Retentio is a smart flashcard app powered by spaced repetition science. It optimizes your review schedule so you spend less time studying while retaining more. Whether you're learning languages, preparing for exams, or mastering new skills, Retentio adapts to your memory patterns for maximum efficiency.

verified.title: Multi-language Support
verified.description: Learn in your preferred language with full internationalization support.

algorithm.title: Smart Algorithm
algorithm.description: Our spaced repetition algorithm adapts to your learning pace for optimal retention.

ui.title: Beautiful Design
ui.description: A clean, modern interface that makes studying a pleasure, not a chore.

ai.title: AI Powered
ai.description: Leverage artificial intelligence to generate flashcards and optimize your study sessions.

step1.title: Create Your Cards
step1.description: Add flashcards manually or import them from various sources. Organize them into decks for easy management.

step2.title: Study Smart
step2.description: Our algorithm schedules reviews at the optimal time, right before you're about to forget.

step3.title: Track Progress
step3.description: Watch your knowledge grow over time with detailed statistics and progress tracking.

cta.title: Start Learning Today
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of learners who are already using Retentio to remember more, for longer.
